text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That freshly steamed rice and grilled salmon sure
hit the spot...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huh?! D-did I say that out loud?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nah, just a good guess. I figured you'd be thinkin'
'bout food.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's amazing, Tama! You're like a real-life
fortune teller!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yep, yep, it's always been a dream of mine...
Nooot!
